field.label: Enabled
field.help: This will enable or disable this DNS-over-TLS forwarder.

field.label: IP Address
field.help: Set the IPv4 or IPv6 address of the upstream DoT server (e.g. 1.1.1.1 for Cloudflare).

field.label: Port
field.help: Set the destination port. Defaults to 853 (the standard DNS-over-TLS port).

field.label: TLS Hostname
field.help: Set the TLS hostname for certificate verification (e.g. cloudflare-dns.com). If set, Strict TLS (RFC 9103) is used: the upstream certificate must match this hostname, verified against the system CA bundle. If left empty, Opportunistic TLS is used: the connection is encrypted but the server's identity is NOT verified.
